description: Features section removed in B — testimonials shifts up
notes: KNOWN system finding: at semantic level, gemma-4-e2b calls these pages equivalent (~19.7% AE, SSIM 0.899) even though the visible viewport in A shows feature cards and in B shows testimonials. Same pair under loose's ambiguity-band tiebreak gets the correct 'not equivalent' verdict, suggesting the semantic prompt is more permissive than the band-tiebreak prompt — or the small model is non-deterministic. Phase 4 (stronger LM) should resolve this; until then this expectation is intentionally hard so the corpus continues to surface it.
